message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Reminder: need consent on Task #2">
Reviewers — Task #2 (CSS gaps, commit 2b5789a) is waiting for your consent. CI is already green. Please read static/css/main.css and send "I consent" or raise concerns. We need all 8 reviewers to respond before moving to the driver rotation for Tasks #3-5.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I already reviewed and consented to this commit. Let me reconfirm.

input.content:
I already reviewed commit 2b5789a and sent my consent. To reconfirm clearly:

**I consent** to Task #2 (2b5789a -- CSS gaps fix).

Full review was in my previous message. Summary: all 7 CSS additions verified against templates, class mismatch fix correct, :empty collapse pattern appropriate for a11y, CI green, no concerns.
